title: GC GAVENO CAVAILIA 3 Piece Complete Bedding Set - Single Duvet Cover Set With Fitted Sheet - Polycotton Bed Set
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: GEOMETRICAL COMPLETE BEDDING SET: Charming Adorable geometri bed cover set will optimize your room look. Gorgeous bed sheets set complete with a duvet cover on the bed will create the luxury geometrical design imaginary image in your mind and keep you relaxed.

DURABLE BED SET: A complete duvet set with fitted sheets has been made by using poly cotton material in which 30% cotton and 70% polyester are used. A beautiful complete geometric bedding set consists of a quilt cover,fitted sheet and pillowcase(s) (50x75 Cm ).

SOFT AND SMOOTH COVER SET: Enduring poly cotton material is used in manufacturing the complete bedding set, which makes the poly cotton bedding set delicate. The texture of the soft bed set is cosy and even that will give you congenial sleep for a long time.

EASY CARE QUILT COVER SET: This geometric bed set with a fitted sheet set from GC GAVENO CAVAILIA This duvet set with fitted sheet set from GC GAVENO CAVAILIA has polycotton fabric which offers stress-free nights.

CARE INSTRUCTIONS: The complete bedding set with the sheet is machine washable fabric. You can wash the bedding at 40° c and only use soft detergent for cleaning the geometric bedding set. Don’t use bleach and don't dry clean. This smooth bed sheet set can be tumble-dried and ironed at a low temperature.
